name: NETSTEPS
description: NetSteps (founded 2003, Pleasant Grove UT) provides the ENCORE platform — a comprehensive cloud SaaS solution for the global direct-selling and MLM industry. Features commerce, compensation management, party planning, social networking, and brand management. Clients include Scentsy, Natura, Synergy, and Rodan+Fields. Inc 5000 #137 (2010), 1M+ users in 30+ countries.

name: CONTRA.WORK, INC.
industry: Future of Work / Freelance Marketplace SaaS
description: Contra is a commission-free professional freelance networking platform for independent contractors. Freelancers keep 100% of earnings. Founded 2019 by Ben Huffman and Gajus Kuizinas in San Francisco. 1M+ users. Series B $30M (NEA, Unusual Ventures, Cowboy Ventures, Nov 2021). Total funding: $59M (PitchBook).

name: RFX SOLUTIONS, INC.
description: RFX Solutions is a SaaS compliance platform for ambulatory surgery centers (ASCs) and healthcare facilities. Replaces disconnected spreadsheets with unified platform for credentialing, regulatory compliance, staff training, vendor contracts, incident reporting, and employee files. Founded 2020 by Amanda Penrod (PhD, 25yrs healthcare experience) and Luke Woodard (CTO). 28 employees. $9M Series A (April 2024) led by Arthur Ventures.

name: OSAGE MANHATTAN BUILDERS A JOINT VENTURE
filter_reason: Construction joint venture between Osage LLC and Manhattan Construction. Not a tech company.

name: ONVISOURCE, INC.
description: OnviSource is a contact center and enterprise software provider offering AI-driven workforce optimization, customer analytics, and intelligent automation. Products include EngageHub (AI-native contact center platform) and OnviCloud (SaaS). Founded 2004, Plano TX HQ with Oklahoma offices. Serves banking, healthcare, telecom, and contact centers. Phone: (800) 311-3025.

name: ADVANCED MICRO SOLUTIONS INC
description: Advanced Micro Solutions (AMS) provides 1099-ETC, specialized tax form software for preparing and filing 1099, W-2, W-2C, 941 and other IRS/SSA forms. Desktop and cloud-based payroll and tax compliance software for small businesses, CPAs, and tax professionals. Mustang, Oklahoma based.

name: ELECTRONIC STORAGE CORP
description: Electronic Storage Corp provides LaserVault, a document management and enterprise content management (ECM) platform for digital document storage, retrieval, workflow automation, and archiving. Founded 1996, Oklahoma City area. Serves banking, healthcare, and government sectors.

name: GLOBAL INTERFACE SOLUTION, INC.
description: Global Interface Solution (SecureAgent Software) provides insurance agency management software with CRM, commission tracking, carrier integration, and compliance tools for independent insurance agents and agencies. Oklahoma City area, founded 2006.

name: QDOS INC
description: QDOS Inc (DeskSite) provides document management software for legal professionals and enterprises, with features for matter management, document organization, profiling, and retrieval integrated with iManage/WorkSite environments. California-based legal tech software company.

name: IDEVICES LLC
filter_reason: iDevices (smart home IoT, first Apple HomeKit-enabled smart plug) was acquired by Hubbell Incorporated in April 2017. Now operates as part of Hubbell Wiring Device-Kellems. No longer an independent company.

name: EASYRX, LLC
description: EasyRx is a cloud-based SaaS platform integrating dental/orthodontic prescriptions, digital workflows, 3D software (EasyRx 3D with AI-powered STL editing), and lab management for practices and labs. Enables fully paperless prescription workflows, intraoral scanner integrations, and lab management. Founded 2020 by Todd Blankenbecler (CEO). Active partnerships with Dentagrafix, The Invisible Orthodontist.

name: EXCEL4APPS INCORPORATED
description: Excel4apps provides Excel-based reporting and analysis add-ins (GL Wand, Report Wand, Budget Wand) for SAP, Oracle, and NetSuite ERP users. Enables finance teams to build live ERP reports directly in Excel with drill-down capabilities. PA entity is the US subsidiary (global HQ in New Zealand/South Africa). Established niche ERP reporting software.
